moments.title: England vs Ghana in World Cup 2026
moments.blurb: England play their second group stage match of the FIFA World Cup 2026 against Ghana in Boston, USA.

angles.name: Match Build-up
angles.copy: Five days until England take on Ghana in the World Cup! After their opening win, can the Three Lions keep the momentum going?

angles.name: Fan Excitement
angles.copy: Who's already buzzing for England vs Ghana on Tuesday? Get your predictions in now!

angles.name: Tactical Talk
angles.copy: Tuchel's England squad faces Ghana next. What changes would you make after the Croatia game? Tell us your starting XI!

moments.title: Scotland vs Morocco in World Cup 2026
moments.blurb: Scotland face Morocco in their second FIFA World Cup 2026 group match tomorrow, looking to bounce back.

angles.name: Match Preview
angles.copy: It's Scotland's turn to shine tomorrow night against Morocco! After a tough opener, can the Tartan Army rally for a crucial win?

angles.name: Scottish Pride
angles.copy: All eyes on Scotland tomorrow as they take on Morocco in the World Cup! Send your messages of support!

angles.name: Local Buzz
angles.copy: Glasgow, Edinburgh, all of Scotland – where will you be watching the big game tomorrow? Let's hear your predictions for Scotland vs Morocco!

moments.title: Isle of Wight Festival 2026 Underway
moments.blurb: The iconic Isle of Wight Festival kicks off today, running until June 21st, with a diverse line-up of rock, pop, and electronic artists.

angles.name: Festival Kicks Off
angles.copy: It's HERE! The Isle of Wight Festival 2026 is officially underway. Who's heading to Seaclose Park this weekend?

angles.name: Live Vibes
angles.copy: Sun's out (hopefully!) and the music's starting! What acts are you most excited to see at the Isle of Wight Festival today?

angles.name: Weekend Plans
angles.copy: If you're on the Isle of Wight, the festival is the place to be! Catch all the action live through Sunday.

moments.title: TRNSMT Festival 2026 this weekend
moments.blurb: Glasgow Green comes alive this weekend for TRNSMT Festival, running from June 19-21 with a huge line-up of artists.

angles.name: Glasgow Green Ready
angles.copy: TRNSMT Festival is just ONE day away! Glasgow Green is gearing up for a massive weekend of music. Who are you buzzing to see?

angles.name: Festival Forecast
angles.copy: Pack your wellies or your sun cream? It's almost TRNSMT time! What's your essential festival kit for Glasgow Green?

angles.name: Scotland's Big Weekend
angles.copy: From Friday to Sunday, TRNSMT is the place to be in Scotland! Get ready for an unforgettable few days of live music.

moments.title: Blenheim Palace Festival approaching
moments.blurb: The debut Blenheim Palace Festival starts on June 27th, featuring Katy Perry, Alanis Morissette, Michael Bublé, and Pete Tong Ibiza Classics.

angles.name: Star-studded Line-up
angles.copy: Katy Perry, Alanis Morissette, Michael Bublé, Pete Tong... the Blenheim Palace Festival kicks off in just over a week! Who's on your must-see list?

angles.name: Unique Venue
angles.copy: Live music in the stunning grounds of Blenheim Palace? Yes please! Get ready for a unique festival experience from June 27th.

angles.name: Genre Spanning
angles.copy: Pop to rock to dance classics – Blenheim Palace Festival has it all! What's your ideal summer concert experience?

moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 begins soon
moments.blurb: The Championships, Wimbledon, the most prestigious tennis tournament, begins on Monday, June 29th, at the All England Club in London.

angles.name: Tennis Countdown
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream at the ready! Wimbledon 2026 kicks off in just under two weeks. Who are you backing for the titles this year?

angles.name: London Calling
angles.copy: The All England Club is getting set for the world's best tennis stars! London will be buzzing as Wimbledon begins on June 29th.

angles.name: Grand Slam Anticipation
angles.copy: The grass court season culminates at Wimbledon! Who's hoping for a British champion this year?

moments.title: Summer Solstice this Sunday
moments.blurb: The Summer Solstice, marking the longest day of the year in the Northern Hemisphere, occurs on Sunday, June 21st, at 9:24 AM BST.

angles.name: Longest Day
angles.copy: Get ready for maximum daylight! The Summer Solstice is this Sunday, June 21st. How are you planning to make the most of the longest day?

angles.name: Stonehenge Celebrations
angles.copy: Thousands will gather at Stonehenge for sunrise on Sunday to celebrate the Summer Solstice. A truly ancient tradition!

angles.name: Penzance Festival
angles.copy: Beyond Stonehenge, Penzance in Cornwall is celebrating the solstice with its Golowan Festival from June 19-28! Will you be joining the festivities?

moments.title: Paul McCartney's 84th Birthday
moments.blurb: Sir Paul McCartney, legendary singer-songwriter and former Beatle, celebrates his 84th birthday today.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Macca
angles.copy: Happy 84th Birthday to the one and only Sir Paul McCartney! What's your favourite Beatles or Wings track?

angles.name: Living Legend
angles.copy: From Liverpool to global icon, Paul McCartney's influence is unmatched. Celebrating 84 years of legendary music today!

angles.name: Songwriting Genius
angles.copy: Could you pick just ONE Paul McCartney song as your favourite? We're celebrating his 84th birthday with a playlist of his greatest hits!

moments.title: Alison Moyet's 65th Birthday
moments.blurb: British singer-songwriter Alison Moyet, known for Yazoo and her successful solo career, turns 65 today.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Alison
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 65th Birthday to the incredible Alison Moyet! What's your go-to Yazoo or solo hit?

angles.name: Iconic Voice
angles.copy: That voice! Celebrating 65 years of Alison Moyet's powerful vocals and timeless songs today.

angles.name: 80s Superstar
angles.copy: From 'Only You' to 'All Cried Out', Alison Moyet defined an era. Happy Birthday to an 80s icon!

moments.title: Josh Dun's 38th Birthday
moments.blurb: Josh Dun, the dynamic drummer of Twenty One Pilots, celebrates his 38th birthday today.

angles.name: TØP Drummer's Day
angles.copy: Happy 38th Birthday to the incredible Josh Dun of Twenty One Pilots! What's your favourite TØP song to drum along to?

angles.name: Twenty One Pilots Fan Love
angles.copy: Celebrating Josh Dun's birthday today! Send your birthday wishes to the Twenty One Pilots drummer!

angles.name: Percussion Power
angles.copy: 38 years young and still bringing the beats! Happy Birthday, Josh Dun, keeping Twenty One Pilots' sound iconic.

moments.title: Lionel Richie's 77th Birthday
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer-songwriter Lionel Richie will celebrate his 77th birthday on Saturday, June 20th.

angles.name: Weekend Birthday Vibes
angles.copy: All Night Long! Lionel Richie celebrates his 77th birthday this Saturday. What's your favourite 'Hello' from the legend?

angles.name: Soulful Sounds
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate a true music icon this weekend! Wishing Lionel Richie a very Happy 77th Birthday for Saturday.

angles.name: Love Songs King
angles.copy: From The Commodores to a phenomenal solo career, Lionel Richie has given us so many classics. Happy Birthday for Saturday!

moments.title: House of the Dragon Season 3 Premiere
moments.blurb: The highly anticipated third season of HBO's 'House of the Dragon' premieres on Sky Atlantic and NOW on Monday, June 22nd.

angles.name: Dragons Return
angles.copy: Fire will reign! House of the Dragon Season 3 lands on Sky Atlantic and NOW this Monday. Are you ready for more Westeros drama?

angles.name: Westeros Buzz
angles.copy: The wait is almost over! House of the Dragon Season 3 premieres Monday. What are your predictions for the new season?

angles.name: Must-Watch TV
angles.copy: Clear your schedules! House of the Dragon S3 is set to dominate your screens from Monday. Who's watching?

moments.title: Taylor Swift's latest UK Chart #1
moments.blurb: Taylor Swift's 'I Knew It, I Knew You' from the 'Toy Story 5' soundtrack recently hit number one on the UK Singles Chart for the week ending June 18th.

angles.name: Swiftie Success
angles.copy: Another week, another Taylor Swift chart-topper! 'I Knew It, I Knew You' recently hit number one. What's your favourite T-Swift track right now?

angles.name: Chart Talk
angles.copy: Taylor Swift's 'Toy Story 5' track 'I Knew It, I Knew You' was a recent UK #1! Are you a fan of her soundtrack work?

angles.name: Pop Dominance
angles.copy: Taylor Swift continues her chart reign with 'I Knew It, I Knew You'. What other artists are dominating your playlists this week?

moments.title: Outbreak Fest in Manchester next week
moments.blurb: Outbreak Fest, a hardcore, punk, and alternative music festival, takes over BEC Arena in Manchester from June 26-28.

angles.name: Manchester Mosh
angles.copy: Calling all rock and punk fans! Outbreak Fest hits Manchester next week, June 26-28. Who's ready to hit the mosh pit?

angles.name: Alternative Agenda
angles.copy: Manchester's BEC Arena will be shaking next weekend for Outbreak Fest! A huge line-up for lovers of hardcore, punk, and alternative music.

angles.name: Festival Countdown
angles.copy: Just over a week until Outbreak Fest takes over Manchester! What bands are you most excited to see?
